rows.fingerprint: WITH pgrst_source AS ( SELECT public.dispatch_assignments.* FROM public.dispatch_assignments WHERE station = $1 ORDER BY flight_date DESC LIMIT
WITH pgrst_source AS ( SELECT public.flight_schedules.* ... WHERE authority = $1 AND NOT status = ANY($2) ORDER BY arrival_date DESC
WITH pgrst_source AS ( SELECT public.dispatch_assignments.* FROM public.dispatch_assignments ORDER BY flight_date DESC LIMIT
WITH pgrst_source AS ( SELECT public.flight_schedules.* ... WHERE authority = $1 ORDER BY arrival_date DESC
WITH pgrst_source AS ( SELECT public.user_roles.role FROM public.user_roles WHERE user_id = $1
WITH pgrst_source AS ( SELECT public.contract_service_rates.* FROM public.contract_service_rates LIMIT
WITH pgrst_source AS ( SELECT public.dispatch_assignments.* FROM public.dispatch_assignments ORDER BY flight_date DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT
WITH pgrst_source AS ( SELECT public.flight_schedules.* FROM public.flight_schedules ORDER BY arrival_date DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT
WITH pgrst_source AS ( SELECT public.contract_service_rates.* FROM public.contract_service_rates WHERE contract_id = $1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT
WITH pgrst_source AS ( SELECT public.airports.id, public.airports.name, public.airports.iata_code, public.airports.city FROM public.airports ORDER BY iata_code ASC LIMIT
WITH pgrst_source AS ( SELECT public.airlines.id, public.airlines.name, public.airlines.iata_code, public.airlines.code FROM public.airlines ORDER BY name ASC LIMIT
WITH pgrst_source AS ( SELECT public.profiles.station FROM public.profiles WHERE user_id = $1
WITH pgrst_source AS ( SELECT public.flight_schedules.id, public.flight_schedules.status FROM public.flight_schedules WHERE status = $1
